text:
There once was a little mouse hole. Every morning, you'd hear a tiny voice chirping. One day, a shiny red ball rolled into their hole. The little mouse thought it stars. It rolled into a treasure chest! Then it vanished. The mouse sighed.

A few sunbeams later, a tiny knight strutted in. "Fear not!" he smiled. "I've come here to save you!"

With feathers glimmering like sunlight, he flew away. Later, the knight returned, this time with wings painted hot pink.

"Here I am! I've got magic!"

With a wave and sprinkle of fairy dust, the ball transformed into a fluffy cloudscape. The mouse laughed.

"Go home!" they wished. Soon enough, the cloud vanished.

One night, fireworks lit up. Mouse and ball rode through a rainbow. When dawn broke, they were back home.

That's the end. Every evening now? They'd play together. Ball bouncing. Mouse flying.
